project_overview.name: EventPass - College Event Management System
project_overview.purpose: A comprehensive digital platform for managing college events, student registrations, and digital pass generation with QR code verification
project_overview.main_goal: Digitize and streamline the entire event management process from event creation to pass verification

main_components.app.py: Main Flask application containing all routes, business logic, and database operations
main_components.templates/: HTML templates using Jinja2 templating engine
main_components.static/: Static assets including generated QR code images
main_components.wsgi.py: WSGI entry point for production deployment

system_architecture.design_philosophy: Single-file Flask application for simplicity and easy deployment

database_schema.description: SQLite database with 4 main tables handling users, events, registrations, and notifications

students.purpose: Store student user accounts and profile information
students.login_methods: Students can login using username OR exam_roll_no OR phone number

events.purpose: Store event information created by administrators

registrations.purpose: Link students to events and track pass status

relationships.students_to_registrations: One-to-Many (One student can register for multiple events)
relationships.events_to_registrations: One-to-Many (One event can have multiple registrations)
relationships.students_to_notifications: One-to-Many (One student can have multiple notifications)

authentication.registration: Self-registration with name, roll numbers, father's name, username, phone

permissions: View own registrations and pass status

registration_process.step_1: Student fills registration form with personal and academic details
registration_process.step_2: System validates unique constraints (username, phone, exam_roll_no)
registration_process.step_3: Password is hashed and account is created
registration_process.step_4: Student can immediately login and access dashboard

event_registration_process.step_1: Student browses events on dashboard with search/filter options
event_registration_process.step_2: Student views event details including date, venue, capacity, fee
event_registration_process.step_3: Student clicks 'Register Now' if event has available capacity
event_registration_process.step_5: Student receives notification about pending approval
event_registration_process.step_6: Student waits for admin approval to get downloadable pass

pass_management.viewing: Students can view all their registrations with status indicators
pass_management.downloading: Only approved passes can be downloaded as PNG images
pass_management.verification: Each pass contains QR code with embedded student and event data

event_management.creation: Admin creates events with title, description, category, date/time, venue, capacity, fee
event_management.editing: Admin can modify event details anytime
event_management.categories: Events are categorized as Technical, Cultural, Sports, Academic, or General

pass_approval_system.review_process: Admin reviews pending registrations with full student and event details
pass_approval_system.approval: Admin approves registration → system generates QR pass with serial number
pass_approval_system.rejection: Admin can reject with optional reason → student gets notification
pass_approval_system.bulk_operations: Admin can approve multiple passes at once
pass_approval_system.re_approval: Admin can re-approve previously rejected passes

student_management.viewing: Admin can view all registered students with search functionality
student_management.details: Admin can see individual student profiles and registration history
student_management.communication: Admin can send notifications to all students or only registered ones

pass_generation.technology: PIL (Python Imaging Library) for image creation
pass_generation.qr_library: qrcode library for QR code generation
pass_generation.design: Professional A5-landscape layout with college branding

student_information: Class roll number and exam roll number
pass_content.qr_code_data: Contains all above information as readable text for verification

verification_methods: QR code scanning reveals all embedded data

user_interface_design.design_philosophy: Custom CSS design without external frameworks for full control

layout_structure.sidebar_navigation: Fixed left sidebar with role-based menu items
layout_structure.main_content: Right panel with topbar and scrollable content area
layout_structure.responsive_design: Grid layouts that adapt to different screen sizes

student_interface.dashboard: Event grid with search/filter, statistics cards, welcome hero
student_interface.my_passes: Card-based layout showing all registrations with status badges
student_interface.event_detail: Detailed event view with registration button and capacity indicator
student_interface.notifications: List of system notifications with read/unread status

admin_interface.dashboard: Statistics overview, recent registrations table, notification sender
admin_interface.event_management: CRUD interface for events with category-based styling
admin_interface.pass_approval: Detailed registration review with approve/reject actions
admin_interface.student_management: Searchable student list with individual profile views

authentication_security.session_management: Flask session handling with secure secret key
authentication_security.rate_limiting: Login attempt limiting (5 attempts per 15 minutes)
authentication_security.multiple_login_methods: Username, exam roll number, or phone number

application_security.input_validation: Server-side validation for all form inputs

data_protection.access_control: Role-based access to different application areas
data_protection.audit_trail: Approval timestamps and admin tracking for passes

notification_system.purpose: Keep students informed about events and pass status changes

manual: Admin announcements to registered students only

user_experience.notification_badge: Shows unread count in sidebar and topbar
user_experience.notification_center: Dedicated page for viewing all notifications
user_experience.real_time_updates: JavaScript polling every 25 seconds for new notifications

app_py.purpose: Main application file containing all Flask routes and business logic
app_py.size_note: Large single file (~2000+ lines) for simplicity and easy deployment

templates_folder.base_html: Master template with sidebar navigation and common styling

static_qrcodes_folder.file_management: Images persist for download and verification

development_setup.database: SQLite database auto-created on first run with sample data

sample_data.credentials: admin/admin@123 for admin, various student accounts

unique_features: Multiple login methods for students (username/roll number/phone)
Professional QR pass generation with embedded data
technical_advantages: Single-file Flask application for easy deployment
No external CSS frameworks - fully custom design

feature_enhancements: Payment gateway integration for paid events

how_to_explain_to_ai.project_summary: This is a complete college event management system built with Flask that handles the entire lifecycle from event creation by admins to pass generation for students. The key workflow is: Admin creates events → Students register → Admin approves registrations → System generates QR passes → Students download and use passes for event entry.
key_concepts_for_ai: Two-tier user system: Students (self-register) and Admin (single account)
Pass approval workflow: Registration → Pending → Admin Review → Approved/Rejected → Pass Generation
QR passes contain all student and event data as readable text for verification
Real-time notifications keep students informed of status changes
Professional pass design with college branding and security features
how_to_explain_to_ai.technical_architecture_summary: Monolithic Flask app with SQLite database, custom CSS design, PIL for image generation, and qrcode library for QR creation. All routes and business logic in single app.py file for simplicity.
how_to_explain_to_ai.database_relationships: Students register for Events through Registrations table. Notifications link to Students. Pass approval creates QR images stored in static folder.
how_to_explain_to_ai.security_model: Role-based access (student vs admin), password hashing, rate limiting, unique constraints, and audit trails for pass approvals.
